message:
feat(ui): complete color consistency migration to neutral palette

- SpotlightSearch: Replace indigo selection states with neutral
- SwipeablePromptCard: Replace zinc colors with neutral
- page.tsx: Migrate zinc/indigo to neutral (from previous work)
- PromptDetailModal: Migrate zinc/indigo to neutral (from previous work)
- FeaturedPromptsSection: Migrate zinc/indigo to neutral (from previous work)
- BasketSidebar: Minor fixes

Also fixed arbitrary text sizes (text-[Npx]) to standard Tailwind tokens.

Completes UI Color Consistency epic (jeffreysprompts.com-s6ex)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
